## Source: ossf-package-analysis (2bf20042e762e0285aec0d582cd11af431d357a6ef99aab2b9febbbe69e0bf22)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'locale-clamp-middleware' @ 7.99.99 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
